skipped_reason: A fair same-output free-rollout suite beyond copy/probe baselines is not implemented in the live repo. Trace-only/semantic-only/semantic+trace transformers, SlotFormer-like, DINO-WM-like, and FIERY-style same-output baselines remain missing.

source_v1_significance.skipped_reason: A fair same-output free-rollout world-model baseline suite is not fully implemented in the live repo; only trivial/probe baselines and the copy baseline are currently available.
